term: the sun goes to bed down on the bayou
pronunciation: /ðə sʌn ɡoʊz tə bed daʊn ɑn ðə ˈbaɪjuː/
englishDefinitions: A poetic or song-like way of saying that the sun is setting over the bayou.
An expression that creates a peaceful image of evening in a southern wetland setting.
persianTranslation: خورشید در دل بایو به خواب می‌رود
خورشید آرام روی بایو فرو می‌رود
examples: In the song, the sun goes to bed down on the bayou.
The lyrics paint a peaceful picture as the sun goes to bed down on the bayou.
He hummed the line about the sun going to bed down on the bayou.
synonyms: the sun sets over the bayou
